since_last: 30% of 89 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +0.66%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 30% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.00% · BTC +2.17% · Gold +1.68% · Nasdaq100 -1.61%. 30% of 89 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +0.66%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.66%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -6.47%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: TER is the standout at -12.95%
cards.body: Leaders: AVAV +10.76%, ISRG +5.61%, AAPL +4.65%, ADBE +4.51%, ADBE +4.51%. Laggards: TER -12.95%, KLAC -11.03%, CEVA -10.37%, AMBA -10.19%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.82% at $160.41
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.82% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
